# Sunlite Signs LLC

> Sunlite Signs is a wholesale-only LED sign manufacturer based in Florida, USA. We build German-engineered channel letters, blade signs, flat cut letters, cabinet signs, SEG light boxes, and custom fabricated signage exclusively for sign shops and trade professionals across the USA and Canada. We never sell retail.

## Key Facts

- Founded through partnership with LKF Lichtwerbung (Nuremberg, Germany)
- UL 48 Listed — every product fully certified
- 3-week door-to-door delivery across USA & Canada
- 24-hour wholesale quote turnaround
- Complimentary engineering services included with every project
- Wholesale only — we never compete with our customers' retail clients

## Products

- Channel Letters: Front lit, halo lit, combination, side lit, faux neon, trimless (EdgeLuxe LP 5), fabricated stainless steel
- Blade Signs: Illuminated and non-illuminated projecting signs
- Flat Cut Letters: Aluminum, stainless steel, acrylic, brass
- Cabinet Signs: Illuminated, push-through, flex-face
- SEG Light Boxes: Silicone-edged graphic displays
- Custom Fabrication: Bespoke signage solutions

## Signature Product

EdgeLuxe LP 5 Trimless Channel Letters — 1.2" profile, embedded LEDs, no trim cap, precision stainless steel construction. The thinnest illuminated channel letter available.

- Phone: (689) 294-0912

- Website: https://sunlitesigns.com

- Trade accounts only — request pricing at https://sunlitesigns.com/get-a-quote
